section.div: AI-powered data-to-video generation. Upload a table, get a narrated animated data story.
Single-request LLM serving recipes, patches, and benchmarks for modified RTX 2080 Ti 22GB / SM75 systems
The definitive vLLM runtime for dual RTX 2080 Ti 22GB + NVLink, delivering Qwen 27B local inference with 100+ tok/s single-request decode with support of FP8 weight
